title: RefactorWriteOutput
description: Output of 'refactor write'. Reports the result of merging a refactor section into the writer procedure catalog.

ok.description: True on success, false on validation or IO failure.

table.description: Normalised FQN of the target table.

writer.description: Normalised FQN of the writer procedure. Present on success.

catalog_path.description: Absolute path to the updated procedure catalog file. Present on success.

error.description: Error message. Present when ok is false.
